description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow that builds and tests the aws-iot-device-sdk-cpp-v2 package across multiple platforms and configurations. The workflow should trigger on push events to all branches except main. It should include jobs for building on Linux with various images and compilers, on Windows with different Visual Studio versions, and on macOS. Each job should download a builder script, make it executable, and then use it to build the package with specific options.
